title: ReflectionCreatedPayload
description: A higher-level insight distilled from raw memories — the generative-agents reflection step. Producer: memory-service on agent.events (its first producer), aggregateId = villagerId. reflectionId is the reflection's own memory row; sourceMemoryIds is its provenance (mirrors the memories_reflection_provenance CHECK).

sourceMemoryIds.description: The raw memories this insight was distilled from.
